channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘US and Israel have taken majority of Iran’s ballistic missile capability’
item.description: ‘US and Israel have taken the vast majority of Iran’s ballistic missile capability’

item.title: Why Israel targets Beirut’s Dahiyeh and what the suburb means to Lebanon
item.description: Dahiyeh's story is not only about Hezbollah or Israel. It is about how it came to embody Lebanon’s deepest inequalities.

item.title: Beirut building turned to rubble by Israeli attack
item.description: Several central neighbourhoods in Beirut have been attacked in a series of Israeli strikes.

item.title: The oil logic behind Trump’s war on Iran
item.description: The Kharg Island strike shows how US force is calibrated to avoid disrupting global oil flows.

item.title: Aftermath of Iranian ‘revenge’ strikes on Israel, two killed
item.description: Widespread damage was left across areas near Tel Aviv after overnight Iranian missile strikes.

item.title: Israel bombs central Beirut, strafes south, east Lebanon, killing over 20
item.description: Wave of Israeli air attacks launched as ground offensive widens in south where Hezbollah are fighting Israeli forces.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 19 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Iran vows revenge after Israeli strikes kill security chief Ali Larijani and Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani.

item.title: Iran launches ‘revenge’ missile attack on Israel after assassinations
item.description: Iran continues to face a daily onslaught of US and Israeli air attacks in Tehran and across the country. .

item.title: Israeli air strike flattens residential building in Beirut
item.description: Video shows the moment a residential building collapsed in Beirut after an Israeli air strike.

item.title: Iran fires missiles, drones across Gulf, region remains in war crosshairs
item.description: Qatar, UAE, Kuwait and Saudi Arabia report new blasts, interceptions, with war edging to 3-week mark.
